creator: stephan@lichtenauer.co.za
text:
All your work on this is highly appreciated. 

My new Framework 16 notebook has a MT7922 which probably is quite similar to the MT7921, at least e.g. Dell has one combined driver for both chips.

That means supporting this would also improve Framework notebook support.

none4@pci0:1:0:0:	class=0x028000 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x14c3 device=0x0616 subvendor=0x14c3 subdevice=0xe616
    vendor     = 'MEDIATEK Corp.'
    device     = 'MT7922 802.11ax PCI Express Wireless Network Adapter'
    class      = network
